assertions.title: Dataset splitting produces stratified train/dev/test splits
assertions.evidence: 11 tests passed: test_default_ratios, test_custom_ratios, test_invalid_ratios_raise, test_stratification_preserves_difficulty, test_stratification_preserves_language, test_reproducibility_with_seed, test_small_dataset_handled, test_single_task_dataset, test_split_returns_dataset_split_model, test_empty_dataset_raises, test_no_overlap_between_splits. Configurable ratios, difficulty/language stratification, seed reproducibility, and no-overlap between splits all verified.

assertions.title: Dataset versioning produces immutable snapshots
assertions.evidence: 9 tests passed (TestDatasetVersioning class): test_create_version, test_version_is_immutable, test_multiple_versions, test_get_version, test_get_nonexistent_version, test_list_versions, test_latest_version, test_version_preserves_task_data, test_version_snapshot_is_deep_copy. Version snapshots are immutable deep copies; modifying the original dataset does not affect stored versions. Sequential versioning with retrieval by number confirmed.

assertions.title: Dataset decontamination detects duplicates
assertions.evidence: 8 tests passed: test_detect_exact_duplicates, test_detect_near_duplicates, test_no_duplicates_in_clean_dataset, test_threshold_parameter, test_result_contains_flagged_ids, test_empty_dataset, test_single_task, test_result_is_dataclass. Exact and near-duplicate detection works with configurable threshold. Clean datasets produce no false positives.

assertions.title: Dataset difficulty estimation produces meaningful labels
assertions.evidence: 6 tests passed (TestDifficultyEstimator): test_easy_task, test_hard_task, test_medium_task, test_estimate_dataset, test_distribution_reasonable, test_respects_existing_difficulty_when_skipped. Simple tasks get EASY, complex distributed-systems tasks get HARD, moderate tasks get MEDIUM. Distribution across a mixed dataset produces at least 2 difficulty levels.

assertions.title: Dataset export produces standard formats
assertions.evidence: 8 tests passed (TestDatasetExport): test_export_to_json, test_export_to_json_file, test_export_to_csv, test_export_to_csv_file, test_json_round_trip, test_export_empty_dataset, test_json_has_schema_version_and_timestamp, test_csv_preserves_list_fields. JSON export includes schema_version and generated_at. CSV preserves list fields (constraints, dependencies). Round-trip fidelity verified.

assertions.title: Quality report summarizes dataset health
assertions.evidence: 7 tests passed (TestQualityReport): test_basic_report, test_language_counts, test_difficulty_counts, test_flags_short_descriptions, test_flags_missing_setup_commands, test_empty_dataset_report, test_report_to_dict. Reports include counts by language and difficulty, flag short descriptions, flag missing setup commands, and provide to_dict serialization.

assertions.title: Task metadata is complete and validated
assertions.evidence: test_import_validates_task_fields passed: YAML import with invalid fields (empty prompt, negative timeout) raises ValueError. Task Pydantic model validates required fields (id, prompt, language, test_command, difficulty) on construction. The test_import_preserves_all_metadata test also validates that all metadata fields round-trip correctly through export.

assertions.title: Manual task authoring via YAML/TOML metadata
assertions.evidence: 10 tests passed (TestYAMLImport): test_import_single_task, test_import_multiple_tasks, test_import_with_optional_fields, test_import_defaults, test_import_validates_task_fields, test_import_from_file, test_import_empty_tasks_list, test_import_into_dataset, test_import_duplicate_ids_detected, test_import_preserves_all_metadata. YAML import supports single/multiple tasks, optional fields with defaults, file-based import, validation, and full metadata preservation.
assertions.command: uv run pytest tests/test_dataset.py -v -k "yaml or toml or import or author"

assertions.title: Task ID uniqueness enforcement
assertions.evidence: 6 tests passed: test_add_task_enforces_unique_id (raises DuplicateEntry with task ID), test_add_tasks_batch_rejects_duplicate, test_detect_exact_duplicates (decontamination layer), test_detect_near_duplicates, test_no_duplicates_in_clean_dataset, test_import_duplicate_ids_detected (YAML import raises ValueError for duplicate IDs). Uniqueness enforced at Dataset.add_task level and during YAML import.
assertions.command: uv run pytest tests/test_dataset.py -v -k "unique or duplicate"

summary: Tested 9 assertions across dataset management and task format: all 9 passed. 74 tests total in test_dataset.py, all passing in 0.15s. Evidence files saved for each assertion group.
